subcodes.first_line: We do, from this station, send greetings unto Our Name "The Glory" and those that are with Him, and unto Our Name "The Ornament" and those that are with Him, O [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نکبر من هذا المقام علی اسمی الجمال و من معه و علی اسمی الزین و من معه یا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @personal instructions, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
